title: Cost and Financial Aid
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Cost and Financial Aid
Financial Aid at NYU Shanghai
NYU Shanghai is committed to providing educational opportunities to all talented students. NYU understands that financial aid at NYU Shanghai is a significant piece to the undergraduate experience. As such, we encourage all applicants to apply for financial aid by the required deadline.
Financial Aid for Applicants Outside China
Financial aid may take the form of university grants, federal aid (for U.S. citizens/official permanent residents of the United States), or outside scholarships.
For non-Chinese national undergraduate students, eligibility for need-based grants is based on your demonstrated financial need from the CSS Profile, if you apply for financial aid by the required financial aid deadline.
If you wish to be reviewed for need-based institutional funding, you must file the CSS Profile for both your custodial and noncustodial parent households or Noncustodial Waiver Request Form (if applicable). The CSS Profile must be filed by the appropriate deadline, and students are only required to apply once, prior to admission. Please note that NYU Shanghai does not re-evaluate for institutional aid in subsequent years, as typically any institutional grant aid offered upon admission is renewed at the same amount during your time at NYU Shanghai.
US citizens, permanent residents, and eligible non-citizens also need to complete the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) for US federal aid consideration.
Please review the information on our website under Applying for Financial Aid for more details about the required application(s).
Financial Aid Filing Deadlines
Early Decision I applicants: November 10 by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time
Early Decision II applicants: January 10 by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time
Regular Decision applicants: February 1 by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time
New York University School Codes
CSS Profile school code: 2785
FAFSA federal school code: 002785
Contact Us
For additional financial aid questions, please contact:
Office of Financial Aid
Email: shanghai.financial.support@nyu.edu
Phone: +1-212-998-2838 Monday – Friday 10:00 am – 4:00 pm Eastern Standard Time
If you are applying to more than one campus at NYU, be sure to review the financial aid policies and requirements for the New York Campus and Abu Dhabi Campus.
